# ChatGPT-Style Application Project

This project implements a complete ChatGPT-style application with:
- FastAPI backend with streaming chat endpoints
- Next.js frontend with real-time message streaming
- PostgreSQL database for conversation persistence
- Modern UI with dark mode support
- Markdown rendering for code blocks
- RAG agent capabilities with DuckDuckGo search

## Project Structure
- `/backend` - FastAPI server with streaming chat and database integration
- `/frontend` - Next.js React application with real-time chat UI
- `/docker` - Docker configuration for easy deployment

- [x] Customize the Project - Full implementation with all required features
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed
- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed and database created
- [x] Create and Run Task - Tasks created for backend and frontend
- [x] Launch the Project - Demo created showing all features
